S.FORM: Alassane Dramane Ouattara I 1942 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Alassane Dramane Ouattara, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Cote d'ivoirie anini i ci Alassane Dramane Ouattara, patirengan a romi'ad i 2010 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 4 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: a…æassan…ô …¨~…Æraman…ô o~uo~u~uattara i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i a…æassan…ô …¨~…Æraman…ô o~uo~u~uattara, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶o~ut…ô …¨~…Æ °ib~vo~uiri…ô anini i ¶i a…æassan…ô …¨~…Æraman…ô o~uo~u~uattara, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: Alassane Dramane Ouattara I 1942 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Alassane Dramane Ouattara, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Cote d'ivoirie anini i ci Alassane Dramane Ouattara, patirengan a romi'ad i 2010 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 4 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: a…æassan…ô …¨~…Æraman…ô o~uo~u~uattara i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i a…æassan…ô …¨~…Æraman…ô o~uo~u~uattara, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶o~ut…ô …¨~…Æ °ib~vo~uiri…ô anini i ¶i a…æassan…ô …¨~…Æraman…ô o~uo~u~uattara, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
